title: Marketplace Manager - Vision Express India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Vision Express India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vision Express India family as a Marketplace Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vision Express India:
Vision Express India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India!
